titleStmt.title: SII 37.240: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 240. (A.R. No. B 332 of 1940-41.) Mēḍidinne, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying near the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Śaka 1477 (expired), Ānanda, Chaitra śu. 10, corresponding to 1554 A.D., March 13, Wednesday.

It registers the gift of the Vipravinōdi-varttana made by Parvatayya and Anantayya, sons of Pedavallabhayya of the Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā of the Vipravinōdiṅ community for the daśami-mahōtsvas of gods Chennakēśava and Hanumān of the agrahāra village Mēḍiguḍidinne alias Kṛishṇarājasamudram in the Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma of the Chanandragirirājya. The gift was given on the holy occasion of Śrīrāmanavami.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . svasti śrī jayā
dbudaya śālivāhana śakhavaru
ṣaṁbulu 1477 Agunēṭi Ānaṁda saṁva
tsara caitra śu 10 lu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī
satāsivadēvamahārāyalu
vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvā
sanārūḍuṁḍai pṛdhvisāmrājyaṁ
śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu caṁdragiri rājyānaku
cellē ghaṁḍikōṭasīmalōni palle mēḍigu
ḍidiṁnnaku pratināmamaina kriṣṇarā
yasamudraṁ Anē Agrahārama
du śrī Akhilāṁḍakōṭi brahmāṁ
ḍanāyakuṁḍaina vēdavēdāṁta
vvēdyuṁḍaina purāṇapuruṣōttamu
ṁḍaIna śrī cenakēśvara dēvuniki śrī hanu
maṁtadēvuniki daśami mahōtsavālaku
śrī hanumaṁta perumāḷu daśami mō
vaṁ dēvuṁḍu vuṁḍē Aṁduku kāśya
pagōtraṁ Āpastaṁba sūtraṁ yaku
śākhādhyāyulayina vipravinōdla peda
vallabhayyagāri komāḷlu paravataya Ana
tayyagārunnu vasiṣṭhagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbha
sūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyulayina vipra vi
nōdi kēsuvaya komāruṁḍu caṁnnayagā
rlu jana yiddaru nēkastule yiccina vipravinōdi
nōdi dharmaśāsanaṁ . tmavipravinōdula
ku yicē vartanalu śrīrāmanavami
puṇyakālamaṁdu māvipravinōdi
kulaṁvārikellā puṇyaṁgānu tama pu
tra pautrapāraṁparyaṁgā Ācaṁdrārkka
sthāyigānu sahiraṇyōdaka dāna
dhārāpūrva kaṁgānu mā vipravinōdi vā
rikellānu puṁṇyaṁgānu trivācikaṁgā
dharmaśāsanaṁ . yī dharmaṁ
vāru ya
tallitaṁḍrādula
vipravinōdu
yi dharmāna
Aṁdejātivā
vāru svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . sāmā
nyōsyaṁ dharmasētu nṛpāṇaṁ kālēpālaniyō
bhavadbhiḥ pārtivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō
yā
Digital edition of SII 37.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
